name: msp-55_chrIV_locus
description: msp-55 paralog within the chrIV Major Sperm Protein tandem cluster. Single-exon ~350 bp ORF encoding a ~125 aa MSP. Identity to neighbouring msp paralogs >95% in CDS; reliable read-level assignment requires 3' UTR or intergenic PSVs.
expected_copy_count: 1 paralog within the ~28-40 msp gene family
